query: SELECT ugm.user_id, u.name, ug.nome as grupo FROM user_group_members ugm JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.id = ugm.group_id JOIN user u ON u.id = ugm.user_id; SELECT ugp.rota, ugp.can_view, ugp.can_edit, ugp.ocultar_valores, ugp.ocultar_documentos FROM user_group_permissions ugp JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.id = ugp.group_id WHERE ug.nome = 'TST'
